uses-permission.documentation:comment: This permission is used by both the app (optionally, via in-app settings toggle) and Work Manager to manage background work. In this case, used to ensure that widgets are synced and are updated as expected.
Optional permission to manage background work. In this case, used to ensure that widgets are synced and are updated as expected.
Used by LeakCanary in debug builds only.
Used by LeakCanary in debug builds only.
This permission is needed to restore widgets after a device restart. It instructs Android to run the application every time you start your phone.
Optional permission to ignore battery optimizations, making sure widgets are updated as expected.

This is an optional permission needed to use shorter intervals to switch photos, ensuring that they follow the selected schedule exactly. An app holding this permission can schedule work to happen at a desired time in the future. This also means that the app can run when not actively using the device. The system invokes an exact alarm at a precise moment in the future.
This permission is used by Work Manager to manage background work, in this case, used to ensure that widgets are synced and are updated as expected.
Used by LeakCanary in debug builds only.

This is not a real permission, but rather a quirk. It is used with API level 33 and above (Android 13+), simply meaning that the application intends to send intents – but only to itself, while rejecting them from elsewhere.

permission.documentation:comment: This is not a real permission, but rather a quirk. It is used with API level 33 and above (Android 13+), simply meaning that the application intends to send intents – but only to itself, while rejecting them from elsewhere.
